description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular design with a low-pitched, wide gable roof in a dark gray color. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by slender columns and flanked by vertical wooden slats, providing both shade and privacy. Large glass windows and doors dominate the front and side elevations, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure sits on a raised white platform, with steps leading up to the porch. The surrounding landscape includes several stylized, rounded trees and a flat green lawn, suggesting a suburban or park-like setting. The overall appearance is clean, minimalist, and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a wide gray gable roof, large glass windows, and a covered front porch, set on a green lawn with stylized trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entrance, and vertical wooden slats flanking the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long expanse of glass windows and the depth of the porch area.
description_view_2: Rear corner view with minimal window openings and a cluster of trees close to the structure.
description_view_3: Back view showing a simpler facade with fewer windows and more tree coverage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
